chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1319 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-10-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned Additional A.G files statement on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
